event: message_start
data: {"type":"message_start","message":{"id":"067f73d105912a86085f59dc868127b4","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[],"model":"MiniMax-M3","stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":14,"output_tokens":0,"cache_creation_input_tokens":0,"cache_read_input_tokens":398,"service_tier":"standard"},"service_tier":"standard"}}

event: ping
data: {"type":"ping"}

event: content_block_start
data: {"type":"content_block_start","index":0,"content_block":{"type":"text","text":""}}

event: content_block_delta
data: {"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"text_delta","text":"I'll"}}

event: content_block_delta
data: {"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"text_delta","text":" check the current weather in San Francisco for you."}}

event: content_block_stop
data: {"type":"content_block_stop","index":0}

event: content_block_start
data: {"type":"content_block_start","index":1,"content_block":{"type":"tool_use","id":"call_function_lx2rw2vtb4om_1","name":"get_weather","input":{}}}

event: content_block_delta
data: {"type":"content_block_delta","index":1,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":"{\"location\": \"San Francisco\"}"}}

event: content_block_stop
data: {"type":"content_block_stop","index":1}

event: message_delta
data: {"type":"message_delta","delta":{"stop_reason":"tool_use"},"usage":{"input_tokens":14,"output_tokens":39,"cache_creation_input_tokens":0,"cache_read_input_tokens":398,"service_tier":"standard"}}

event: message_stop
data: {"type":"message_stop"}

data: [DONE]
